---
title: "Interfacing and Communication"
subtitle: "Module 5 — BCSE205L"
author: "Justus Raju"
date: last-modified
---

## Outline

::: {.incremental}
- I/O fundamentals: handshaking, buffering, I/O modules
- Programmed I/O
- Interrupt-driven I/O
- Direct Memory Access (DMA) and Direct Cache Access
- Interrupt structures: vectored and prioritized
- Interrupt overhead
- Buses: synchronous and asynchronous
- Bus arbitration
:::

::: {.notes}
This module covers the fundamentals of I/O interfacing, the different techniques for data transfer between the processor and peripherals, interrupt handling mechanisms, and bus communication protocols.
:::
